name: My Super Baked Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight.
2. Bring to a boil and simmer for 30 minutes. Drain and keep the stock.
3. Put the beans and everything except the stock in a casserole or bean crock.
4. Add hot stock to cover and mix well.
5. Bake at 450°F for 4 hours.
6. Remove 1 cup of beans and mash well.
7. Return the mashed beans to the crock and continue cooking for 3 more hours.
